# Anytt cc — Free TikTok & Pinterest Video Downloader

> Anytt cc (https://anytt.cc) is a free online tool to download TikTok and Pinterest videos without watermark in HD quality. No registration, no app install required. Works on iPhone, Android, Windows, and Mac.

## What It Does

- Download TikTok videos without watermark (HD, Full HD)
- Extract TikTok audio as MP3
- Download Pinterest videos and images
- Batch download support (multiple videos at once)
- 100% free, no signup, unlimited downloads

## How It Works

1. Copy the TikTok or Pinterest video link
2. Paste it into the input box on anytt.cc
3. Click "Download" — choose video quality or MP3
4. Save to your device

- [Pinterest Downloader](/pinterest-downloader): Download Pinterest videos and images.

- [Pinterest FAQ](/pinterest-faq): Common questions about Pinterest downloads.

- [Download Tool](/download): Direct download interface.


## Supported Languages

- English: https://anytt.cc/
- Spanish: https://anytt.cc/es/descargar-tiktok
- Portuguese: https://anytt.cc/pt/baixar-tiktok
- Indonesian: https://anytt.cc/id/unduh-tiktok
- Turkish: https://anytt.cc/tr/tiktok-indir
- Thai: https://anytt.cc/th/tiktok-download
- Vietnamese: https://anytt.cc/vi/tai-tiktok
- Bengali: https://anytt.cc/bn/tiktok-download
- Hindi: https://anytt.cc/hi/tiktok-download

## Key Facts

- Brand name: Anytt cc (also known as AnyTT, anytt.cc, any tt cc)
- Category: Online Video Downloader / Multimedia Tool
- Price: Free
- Platforms: Web-based (works on all devices with a browser)
- No app installation needed
- No watermark on downloaded videos
- Supports HD and Full HD quality
- Privacy-focused: no user data stored
